text:
Also, the reps number and - + buttons should be bigger [...] - **Bigger stepper** — larger bold reps number and ~52pt +/− glass buttons (rep-based sets only; hidden on timed sets). [...] ## 4. Bigger reps stepper
- **ControlsView.swift** — `RepsNudgeRow` rebuilt: reps value is now `.system(size: 34, weight: .bold, design: .rounded)` with a numeric-text transition, flanked by two 52pt circular glass `StepperCircle` buttons (20pt bold glyphs) wrapped in a `GlassEffectContainer`. It stays on rep-based sets only (still gated by `if case .reps`), so timed sets show the timer instead.
